text:
K2B K2B_WEIGHT (K2B) Weight CHAR 3 Oral/nutritional status: height and weight - weight (pounds).
383 K3A K3A_WEIGHT_LOSS (K3A) Weight Loss CHAR 1 Oral/nutritional status: height and weight - weight loss - 5% or more in 30 days; 10% or more in 180 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
384 K3B K3B_WEIGHT_GAIN (K3B) Weight Gain CHAR 1 Oral/nutritional status: height and weight - weight gain - 5% or more in 30 days; 10% or more in 180 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
385 K4A K4A_COMP_FOOD_TAST
